sections.summary: Promotion is deferred until local lock, live-doc unlock, and canonical merge are complete.

reconciliation_phase.title: Local lock
reconciliation_phase.requirement: Freeze this bridge spec as the local source of FIRE truth.

reconciliation_phase.title: Live-doc unlock
reconciliation_phase.requirement: Supply OAuth credentials, rerun blocked QBD query, and record the delta.

reconciliation_phase.title: Canonical merge
reconciliation_phase.requirement: Merge QBD-4, QBD-4X, and QBD 5 into one markdown authority with a section-level supersession manifest.

reconciliation_phase.title: Promotion
reconciliation_phase.requirement: Only after phases 1 and 2 are complete may this bridge seed be promoted into NERVOUS_SYSTEM.

escalation_ledger.action: Re-open the Google Docs gate and store the reconciliation delta beside this bridge spec.
Compile a section-level supersession manifest for QBD-5 over QBD-4 and QBD-4X.
Write the explicit bridge chapter: bit substrate -> truth lattice -> route discipline.
Build the machine-readable hub map for chapters, appendices, truth overlays, and RouteV2.
Hand Water the blocked-source and continuity lane.
Hand Earth the embodiment lane for canonical merge, verifier hooks, and proof closure.
Hand Air the topology lane for stable naming, retrieval anchors, and appendix-first navigation.
Expand typed bridge interfaces into 5D family artifacts only after merge ledger, Water delta, Earth closure, and Air namespace are stable.
Use those family artifacts to derive E1-E9 and E10.
Derive the reverse appendix field Z->K only after the emergent body and family invariants are stable enough to name field roles honestly.
Author Appendix Q and Appendix O as full Mobius bridge maps only after the reverse appendix field exists as more than a placeholder.
Promote the finished bridge into NERVOUS_SYSTEM only when all earlier steps are green and local truth can move from NEAR toward OK.
